Every load-bearing file:line claim independently re-read against the working tree by the parent. Date: 2026-06-19. -->

---

# AUDIT: 1m HYPE candle cache — persisting interior gap ($60→$70 seam, ~4d→~3h)

Scope: regression introduced by `8ad5a31` (on-disk API cache) and `332659b` (older-candle backfill). Symptom: 1m HYPE series contiguous up to ~4d ago, jumps to ~3h ago, $60→$70 price step at the seam, persists across restarts. The interior [~4d → ~3h] region of 1m candles is missing; the index-based x-axis renders the two disjoint blocks as adjacent.

All file:line references verified against the working tree.

---

## 1. ROOT CAUSE

The symptom is **not a single bug** but a two-stage failure: a **formation** mechanism that writes a recent-tailed interior gap into memory/disk, and a **perpetuation** mechanism that re-serves and re-saves that gap on every boot because *nothing anywhere in the candle pipeline detects an interior time gap*. The single unifying invariant violation is: **every freshness/coverage gate keys only on the FIRST and LAST candle; interior contiguity is never checked.**

### The minimal causal chain

**Formation (one-time, supplies the recent tail abutting a stale head):**

The decisive first-formation mechanism is the WS sleep/wake blind append (`sleep-wake-blind-push-forms-gap`, rated *fully* — the only finding graded a full symptom explanation for formation):

1. A 1m HYPE chart is open and `Loaded`; in-memory tail at, say, Day0 09:00, ~$60.
2. Machine sleeps for ~4 days. Both the WS manager read loop and the per-chart broadcast consumer are frozen, so the `tokio::broadcast` ring (cap 10000, `ws/manager.rs:193`) never overflows. Critically, **no `RecvError::Lagged` is produced** — therefore the only runtime self-heal (`apply_chart_ws_candle_lagged → reload_chart_candles`) never fires (`lagged-heal-does-not-fire-on-sleep`).
3. On wake, the manager hits the 45s stale-read timeout (`WS_READ_STALE_AFTER_SECS`), reconnects, re-subscribes, and Hyperliquid pushes the **current** forming 1m candle (~$70) as a normal in-order `Item` — not a lagged event.
4. `apply_chart_ws_candle_update` (`src/chart_update/candles/ws.rs:80`) calls `push_candle` (`src/chart/data/candles.rs:36-51`). Since `last.open_time` (4d ago) ≠ `candle.open_time` (now), it takes the **blind push** branch (lines 43-46) with **no contiguity check**. In-memory series is now `[..4d ago $60 | now $70]`.
5. The WS stream continues delivering one candle/minute; over the next ~3h `push_candle` blind-appends a solid recent block. The series becomes `[..4d ago $60 | ~3h ago..now $70]` — exactly the reported shape. The interval between the two blocks is never fetched.

(A secondary formation path — `merge_candle_page_into_dir` blind-extending a recent network page onto a stale disk block, `merge-blind-extend-bridges-noncontiguous-pages` / `merge-candle-page-extends-without-gap-or-bound` — can seed an equivalent disk gap, but only on the specific stale-boot fetch and is graded *partially*. The WS path is the parsimonious, fully-rated first-former because nothing else in the codebase grafts a recent tail directly onto a stale head; boot only ever fills forward from the newest cached candle.)

**Persistence (every restart — this is what makes it "persist"):**

6. On the next `Refresh` (manual reload, viewport completion, or boot), `apply_chart_candles_loaded` (`src/chart_update/candles/loaded.rs:75, 99-103, 151`) does `merge_candles` (concat + `normalize_candles`, sort+dedup only, **no gap fill**), then clones the whole gapped in-memory vec into `new_cache_data` and calls `cache_candles` (`cache-candles-persists-in-memory-gap-to-disk`, `refresh-loaded-persists-in-memory-gap`).
7. `cache_candles` (`src/chart_state/candles.rs:457-471`) does a **plain replace** save (`save_candles_snapshot → save_candle_snapshot`), writing the gapped vec to disk and stamping `complete_through_ms = candles.last().open_time` (`src/api_cache.rs:253`) — a **false claim of completeness through the recent tail**.
8. On boot, `load_fresh_candles` (`src/api_cache.rs:41-57`) gates only on `now - last.open_time <= lookback_ms`. Because **lookback_ms(1m) = 12h** and the tail is ~3h old, `3h <= 12h` **passes**, and it returns the **whole gapped vec** with no interior scan (`load-fresh-candles-no-gap-check`, `no-interior-gap-detection-perpetuates`, `load-and-cover-have-no-interior-contiguity-check` — the latter rated *fully*).
9. `boot_chart_instances` (`src/app_boot/chart_instances.rs:84-89`) calls `set_candles(gapped_vec)` and sets `cached_start_ms = last (newest) open_time` (~3h ago). `set_candles` (`src/chart/data/candles.rs:13-22`) normalizes+trims, no gap detection. The interior hole is far below `MAX_CHART_CANDLES = 10_000` (10k 1m candles ≈ 6.94 days), so trimming never drops the old block.
10. `build_candle_fetch_request(Some(~3h ago))` (`src/chart_state/candles.rs:99-103`) issues **one** `Refresh` over `start = newest - 2*duration` ≈ `[now-3h-2m, now]`. This fetches only the last ~2-3 candles (and `candles_cover_range` (`src/api_cache.rs:309-333`) often satisfies it from the gapped subset without even hitting the network, since `first.open_time <= start` and `cached_tail >= end-2*interval` are both true — interior hole invisible). The **[~4d → ~3h] interior region is never requested** (`boot-refresh-no-forward-pagination`, `boot-refresh-window-too-small-to-heal`, `boot-single-page-cannot-span-staleness-gap`). There is no forward pagination.
11. The merge re-installs the gap; `cache_candles` re-saves it. **Loop closes → persists across every restart.**

### Why the render shows a price step with no horizontal gap

The chart positions candles by **array index**, not wall-clock time (`src/chart/candle_layer/candles.rs:19-21`: `for i in first_vis..=last_vis { let cx = idx_to_cx(i); }`). The last bar of the old block (index k) and the first bar of the recent block (index k+1) get adjacent pixel x-positions, so a multi-day interior time hole renders as a single $60→$70 vertical discontinuity (`sixty-to-seventy-is-gap-seam-not-value-corruption` — confirms these are real prices, not corrupted/mis-scaled values).

### Wall-clock timeline (concrete)

- **Day 0, 09:00** — 1m HYPE chart open + `Loaded`, contiguous to 09:00, ~$60. WS healthy.
- **Day 0, 09:00:30** — Machine sleeps. Process frozen; broadcast ring untouched → no `Lagged` will ever be produced for this outage.
- **Day 4, 12:00:01** — Wake. Stale-read timeout fires; manager reconnects, re-subscribes `candle:HYPE:1m`. HL pushes the current 1m candle (open_time ~12:00, ~$70) as an in-order `Item`.
- **Day 4, 12:00:01** — `push_candle` blind-appends: in-memory = `[..Day0 09:00 $60 | Day4 12:00 $70]`. No reload triggered.
- **Day 4, 12:00–15:00** — WS streams 1 candle/min; recent block grows `[Day4 12:00 .. 15:00]`. Any `Refresh` that resolves → `cache_candles` plain-saves the gapped series, `complete_through_ms = now`. Gap baked to disk.
- **Day 4, 15:00** — User observes (~3h after wake): `[..Day0 09:00 $60][Day4 12:00..15:00 $70]` rendered adjacent. Seam visible.
- **Any later restart** — `load_fresh_candles` serves the whole vec (tail ~minutes/hours < 12h). Boot `Refresh` fetches only `[newest-2m, now]`, never the interior. Gap re-rendered and re-saved. **Persists.**

---

## 2. CONTRIBUTING / SECONDARY DEFECTS (ranked)

1. **No interior-gap check in the serve path** — `src/api_cache.rs:41-57` `load_fresh_candles` returns the whole vec on a last-candle recency gate; `candles_cover_range` (`309-333`) and `load_candles_for_range_from_dir` (`209-240`) check only endpoints + tail. **The chokepoint that re-displays and re-certifies the gap every boot.** (rated *fully* in `load-and-cover-have-no-interior-contiguity-check`.)

2. **`cache_candles` plain-saves the gapped in-memory vec** — `src/chart_state/candles.rs:457-471` → `save_candle_snapshot` stamps `complete_through_ms = last.open_time` (`api_cache.rs:253`), laundering the in-memory hole to disk with a false completeness claim. Co-equal perpetuator.

3. **Boot/refresh issues one non-paginated request anchored at `newest - 2*duration`** — `src/chart_state/candles.rs:99-103` + `src/app_boot/chart_instances.rs:84-89`. Cannot span a multi-page staleness gap; there is no forward pagination toward `now`, so the interior is never re-fetched.

4. **`push_candle` blind append with no contiguity check** — `src/chart/data/candles.rs:43-46`. The first-formation seam source on WS reconnect after a quiet/sleep outage.

5. **The designated WS self-heal cannot fire on sleep/quiet disconnect** — `apply_chart_ws_candle_lagged` only triggers on `broadcast::error::RecvError::Lagged` (`src/ws/market_streams/candles.rs:57`), which requires ring overflow by a live sender. A frozen process never overflows; a reconnect that resumes cleanly delivers an `Item`, not `Lagged`. The safety net is structurally absent for the exact scenario that forms the gap.

6. **`reload_chart_candles` heal is doubly defeated even when it does fire** — `src/chart_update/candles/reload.rs:26-44` removes the disk cache but does **not** clear `instance.chart.candles` (lines 30-39 keep the gapped series), and refetches only `[now-12h, now]` (`cached_start_ms=None` → `build_candle_fetch_request` None branch). The subsequent `merge_candles` concats the 12h page onto the retained stale block, so a >12h interior gap merely shrinks to `[~4d..~12h]` rather than healing — and is re-persisted. (`reload-heal-merges-fresh-window-onto-stale-block-without-clearing`.)

7. **`merge_candle_page_into_dir` blind-extends + re-stamps complete** — `src/api_cache.rs:264-278`. Seeds a disk gap on the stale-boot fetch (load old block + extend recent page); does **not** re-cement on steady-state boots (the range-load HIT short-circuits it), so it is a formation contributor, not the dominant perpetuator.

8. **`merge_into_candle_series` / `normalize_candles` have zero gap detection** — `src/chart/data/candles.rs:133-144`, `src/api/candles/normalize.rs:19-34`. The shared in-memory sink that silently preserves any hole through concat+sort+dedup+trim.

9. **Backfill can never fill an interior gap** — `src/chart_update/candles/backfill.rs:85-110, 167-213` + `build_older_candle_fetch_request` (`src/chart_state/candles.rs:118-152`): all paging is strictly OLDER than `candles.first()`; viewport backfill is a left-edge gate. Scrolling toward the seam pages *away* from it. Explains why user interaction can't repair the gap.

10. **Spaghetti/secondary share the `(source,symbol,interval)` disk key and plain-save windows** — `candle_key` (`src/api_cache.rs:343-349`) not namespaced; `apply_spaghetti_candles_loaded` (`src/spaghetti_update/data/candles.rs:81`) plain-saves a possibly-short/gapped window, last-writer-wins (`writes_to_run`), can clobber the chart's snapshot. Amplifies persistence; cannot author the exact 4d→3h shape.

11. **Divergent duplicated `candle_interval_ms` tables (1M)** — `src/api_cache.rs:358-377` (has `"1M"`) vs `src/api/candles.rs:224-242` (omits it, returns `None`), and the magnitudes disagree (31d vs `DURATIONS_MS` 30d). **Unrelated to the 1m symptom** (string match is case-sensitive; `"1m"` agrees on both). Maintenance hazard only.

12. **`is_valid_candle` lacks a timestamp plausibility bound** — `src/api/candles/normalize.rs:3-17`. Defense-in-depth gap; not reachable in current code (no producer mis-scales `t`/`T`). Low.

---

## 3. RULED OUT

- **Value corruption / duplicated candle values** — Ruled out (`sixty-to-seventy-is-gap-seam-not-value-corruption`). `Candle` deserializes `t`/`T` as raw `u64`; OHLCV via `de_string_or_number_to_f64` with no scaling. `grep` for `*1000|/1000|as_secs` across the candle path returns zero hits. The $60 and $70 bars are real prices; the seam is a faithful render of absent time.

- **ms↔seconds timestamp mis-scaling** — Ruled out. No conversion anywhere in REST (`response.rs:51`), HL WS (`ws/market_streams/candles.rs:51`), or Hydromancer WS (`ws/hydromancer/market_streams.rs:482`). A seconds-scaled value would sort to the FRONT (a leading outlier ~54 years prior), not an interior 4d→3h seam.

- **The 1M/1m interval-table divergence as the cause** — Ruled out. Case-sensitive match; both tables agree on `"1m" => 60_000`. The divergence only affects monthly (`"1M"`) zero-volume gap padding on the Hydromancer branch — cosmetic, no price corruption, no interior gaps.

- **`MAX_CHART_CANDLES`/`MAX_CACHED_CANDLES` trimming away the old block** — Ruled out. The span (~4d through now) is well under 10_000 1m candles, so neither trim drops the stale block; both render.

- **`is_valid_candle` deleting real bars to form the seam** — Ruled out. Genuine exchange candles satisfy all OHLC cross-field checks; a per-candle predicate cannot create an absence.

- **First-formation via a recent-only *truncated network page* extended onto stale history** — Ruled out as the literal path. HL `candleSnapshot` returns ASCENDING from `startTime` and truncates the NEWEST end (`[start .. start+~5000*interval]`), so merging onto a stale block is *contiguous* with a ~14.5h-old tail (>12h → not served). The recent tail required by the ≤12h gate comes from WS `push_candle`, not from page truncation.

- **The lagged-reload path producing the gap** — Ruled out as formation; it is a (broken) heal path. It also cannot fire on sleep/quiet disconnect at all.

---

## 4. FIX PLAN (priority order, minimal risk first)

### Core fix (highest leverage, breaks the persistence loop) — `src/api_cache.rs`

The single change that stops the symptom regardless of how the gap formed is: **never serve, and never certify as complete, a snapshot with an interior gap.**

1. Add a shared helper (e.g. in `src/api/candles/normalize.rs`, reused by `api_cache`):
   ```
   fn candle_interval_step(interval) -> u64        // delegate to Timeframe::duration_ms — single source of truth
   fn has_interior_gap(candles, interval_ms) -> bool   // any adjacent pair where next.open_time - prev.open_time > interval_ms (small tolerance)
   fn trailing_contiguous_run(candles, interval_ms) -> &[Candle]  // suffix after the last interior gap
   ```
   Use `Timeframe::duration_ms()` (`src/timeframe/metadata.rs` `DURATIONS_MS`) as the authoritative step — this also resolves the duplicated `candle_interval_ms` tables (defect #11).

2. `load_fresh_candles` (`src/api_cache.rs:41-57`): after the recency gate, if `has_interior_gap`, return **only the trailing contiguous run** (preferred — keeps the good recent data, lets `cached_start_ms` and older-backfill repopulate history cleanly) rather than the whole vec. Strict alternative: return `Ok(None)` to force a clean `[now-lookback, now]` refetch.

3. `candles_cover_range` (`309-333`): add an interior-contiguity check over `[start,end]`; report **not covered** when a hole exists, so `load_candles_for_range` MISSES and the network path heals instead of serving a gapped subset.

4. `save_candle_snapshot` (`242-262`): only set `complete_through_ms = last.open_time` when the vec is interior-contiguous; otherwise set it to the start of the trailing contiguous run (or `None`), so `candles_cover_range` cannot falsely certify coverage across a hole.

5. `merge_candle_page_into_dir` (`264-278`): after `extend`+normalize, if non-contiguous, keep only the trailing contiguous run (kills the disk-seeding formation path).

Mirror the same trailing-run/None guard in the in-memory LRU `get_fresh_cached_candles` (`src/chart_state/candles/cache.rs:40-61`).

### Secondary fixes (formation + heal hardening)

6. **`push_candle` gap guard** — `src/chart/data/candles.rs:36-51` + `src/chart_update/candles/ws.rs:80`: pass the timeframe `duration_ms` in; if `candle.open_time > last.open_time + duration_ms` (a forward gap), do **not** blind-append — return a `Gap` signal and have `apply_chart_ws_candle_update` call `reload_chart_candles` (the existing heal). Closes first formation.

7. **Make `reload_chart_candles` a true heal** — `src/chart_update/candles/reload.rs`: clear `instance.chart.candles` before refetch (so the heal is a replace, not a concat onto a stale block), and drive the refetch wide enough to cover on-screen history (or trigger forward-fill / older-backfill) rather than the fixed `[now-12h, now]`.

8. **Deterministic reconnect heal** — surface a reconnect signal from the WS candle stream (`src/ws/market_streams/candles.rs`, `src/ws/manager.rs`) routed like a lagged event, so charts heal after sleep/quiet outages without depending on broadcast overflow.

9. **Forward-fill continuation** — `src/chart_update/candles/loaded.rs`: after a `Refresh` merge, if a residual interior gap remains, enqueue a bounded request for exactly `[gap_start, gap_end]` (a new `BackfillGap`-style mode) and repeat until contiguous. Repairs gaps already in memory that the serve-guard truncated away.

10. **Namespace or merge-write the shared disk key** — defect #10: namespace `candle_key` by consumer role, or make spaghetti/secondary `cache_candles` use a merge write instead of plain replace.

11. **Unify the interval tables** (#11) and **add the `is_valid_candle` lower bound** (#12) as cheap cleanups.

### Required regression tests (per CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md — add tests beside the code; bug fixes need a test that fails without the fix)

- `src/api_cache.rs` tests (`--bin kerosene api_cache::tests`):
  - `load_fresh_candles_rejects_or_trims_interior_gapped_snapshot`: save a 1m vec = old block (~4d ago, $60) + hole + recent tail (~3h ago, $70, <12h old); assert `load_fresh_candles(now)` returns only the contiguous trailing run (`first.open_time == recent block start`, all adjacent deltas == 60_000) or `None`. **Fails today** (returns the whole gapped vec).
  - `load_fresh_candles_serves_contiguous_recent_snapshot` (companion, guards against over-rejection).
  - `candle_range_load_rejects_interior_gap`: `load_candles_for_range_from_dir` over a span crossing the hole returns `Ok(None)`.
  - `merge_candle_page_does_not_claim_coverage_across_an_interior_gap`: after merging a far-future recent page onto a stale block, a range spanning the hole MISSES. (Call `merge_candle_page_into_dir` directly to avoid the background-writer race.)
  - `save_candle_snapshot_marks_gapped_vec_incomplete`: round-trip a gapped vec; assert persisted `complete_through_ms` is not the last open_time.
- `src/chart/tests/data.rs`:
  - `realtime_candle_update_does_not_seal_forward_gap_as_adjacent`: `set_candles` a contiguous block, `push_candle` a candle many intervals ahead; assert no adjacent pair exceeds one interval (gap routed to heal / not blind-appended). **Fails today.**
  - `merge_into_candle_series_drops_disjoint_old_block_keeping_recent_contiguous_run`.
- `src/chart_update/candles/loaded.rs` tests:
  - `refresh_does_not_persist_interior_gap_to_cache`: drive `apply_chart_candles_loaded` Refresh on a gapped instance; assert the cached LRU/disk series is contiguous. **Fails today.**
  - `refresh_with_interior_gap_queues_forward_fill_until_contiguous` (for fix #9).
- `src/chart_update/candles/ws/tests.rs`:
  - `ws_candle_after_gap_triggers_reload_not_blind_append`.
  - `reload_chart_candles_clears_stale_candles_so_heal_does_not_merge_onto_gap` (for fix #7).
- `src/chart_state/candles.rs`:
  - `boot_refresh_request_spans_full_lookback_when_serving_cached` / forward-fill request builder test (for fix #3/#9).
- `src/api/candles/tests.rs`:
  - `interval_ms_tables_agree_on_all_timeframes` (#11) and `candle_parse_preserves_ms_timestamps_no_scaling` (locks in the value-corruption ruling-out).

Run focused: `cargo test --package kerosene --bin kerosene api_cache::tests`, then `cargo test`, `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`.

---

## 5. IMMEDIATE MITIGATION (user)

The poison lives in the on-disk candle cache (JSON under the platform config dir's `candles/hyperliquid/HYPE/1m` key). Clearing it forces a clean refetch on next launch:

- **Targeted:** with the app closed, delete the cached candle file for `hyperliquid / HYPE / 1m` under the cache root (`api_cache::cache_root()` → platform config dir, `candles/` subtree). On relaunch, `load_fresh_candles` returns `None` (no file) and the boot fetch repopulates `[now-12h, now]` contiguously.
- **Broad:** delete the whole `candles/` cache directory if the targeted file is hard to identify; all charts simply re-fetch on next launch.
- **In-app, no file deletion:** trigger a manual chart reload (`Message::ChartReload`) on the 1m HYPE chart — `reload_chart_candles` calls `remove_cached_candles`, deleting the disk+LRU entry. ⚠️ With the current code this is only a partial cure: the refetch is `[now-12h, now]` and does **not** clear the in-memory series, so for a >12h-old gap it can leave a `[~4d..~12h]` remnant and re-persist it. Restarting after a file delete is the reliable manual fix until the core fix lands.

Note: until the serve-path guard (fix #1-2) is in place, the gap can re-form after another sleep/wake cycle even after a manual clear.
